payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, dark-brown wooden cabinet with a recessed door panel and visible vertical edge/seam; the right side of the cabinet is cut off by the crop so the object is partially shown, with a satin finish and slight surface wear visible — appears photographed from about 1.0 m away.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark wood tall cabinet edge-crop","long_description":"Tall, dark-brown wooden cabinet with a recessed door panel and visible vertical edge/seam; the right side of the cabinet is cut off by the crop so the object is partially shown, with a satin finish and slight surface wear visible — appears photographed from about 1.0 m away.","attributes":["dark brown finish","wooden material","recessed door panel","vertical orientation","edge-cropped/partial","visible seam/edge","satin sheen","minor surface wear"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
